title: Assignment Skybolt
writer: Dimitris Vlahos, Gregg G. Tallas, George Maros
actors: Nikos Kourkoulos, Anna Brazzou, Paris Alexander
plot: Dan Holland, an American secret service agent, goes to Greece to find an hydrogen bomb that was stolen from a NATO base in Turkey. There is the risk that foreign agents will activate the bomb to hit the 6th Fleet flagship while it...
